style: SPEED-RUSH sunrise editorial — light pastel (peach/butter/sky, warm off-white), ultra-condensed black display type slamming in with skew/scale motion-blur feel, marquee ticker strips at different speeds, diagonal speed-lines, hard cuts on beat, wavy squiggle underlines. The ONLY black element is the notch island pill (brand anchor) that the action whips past — red mute flash, green agent dots.
font: Anton (display, local woff2) + Space Mono 700 (micro-labels, local woff2)

customize.note: hand-authored — the whip-pan/marquee/notch-anchor motif is a gap none of the 18 caption-* blocks cover; motion primitives per motion-vocabulary (slam, scale_punch, underline_sweep, shake, slide_left/right)

scenes.motion: slam + skew settle on peach bg; diagonal speed-lines streak through; micro mono label 'the old way' ticks in
horizontal whip-pan cut to butter-yellow; giant condensed 'NEVER AGAIN' scale_punch; wavy coral squiggle underline_sweep beneath AGAIN; notch pill whips across the top edge
hard cut, coral-tint bg; word slides in from left with skew; notch pill top-center flashes RED mute dot; mono label 'system-wide'
hard cut, sky-blue bg; 'INVISIBLE' fades to 35% then snaps back (capture-invisible gag); mono label 'not on your recording'
hard cut, butter bg; giant '3' scale_punch; notch pill shows three GREEN dots ticking on in stagger; mono label 'claude · codex · live'
marquee ticker strips (3 rows, different speeds, opposite directions) rush across peach bg while 'ONE GLANCE.' slams center with shake; strips decelerate visually via cut

scenes.text: NotchControls — Stop alt-tabbing. Start glancing. — Free on GitHub
scenes.motion: whip settles onto warm off-white; notch pill glides to top-center with green dots alive; wordmark slide_bottom; tagline word_reveal; 'Free on GitHub' coral pill scale_punch; hold_breath
